<div>

</div>

<div>

${S = \frac{a \cdot v_{a}}{2} = \frac{a \cdot \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \cdot a}{2} = {\frac{\sqrt{3}}{4} \cdot a^{2}}}{}$

</div>
